title: Report ready: Q1 2025 Portfolio Performance
description: Your Q1 2025 portfolio performance report has finished generating and is ready for download.

title: Report ready: Bucharest Office Tower Energy Audit
description: The energy audit for Bucharest Office Tower has been completed. Current energy class is B — review of the refurbishment plan is recommended.

title: Report ready: Refurbishment Cost Tracker
description: The cost tracker for Cluj Business Center and Brașov Green Offices has been updated and exported to Excel.

title: Report ready: Compliance Status – Retail Properties
description: The compliance report for Timișoara Retail Park and Constanța Retail Gallery has been generated. Action is required for bld-003.

title: Iași Logistics Hub has been assigned to you
description: You have been assigned as Object Manager for Iași Logistics Hub. Please confirm the handover and review the project documentation.

title: Constanța Retail Gallery has been assigned to you
description: You have been appointed as Object Manager for Constanța Retail Gallery. The project is in the permitting phase — document submission deadline is June 15, 2025.

title: Refurbishment project for Bucharest Office Tower is overdue
description: Refurbishment project for Bucharest Office Tower was expected to close in 2024. The current status is overdue. A project plan update is required.

title: Refurbishment project for Timișoara Retail Park is overdue
description: Timișoara Retail Park was expected to close in 2023. Refurbishment costs have exceeded the initial budget by 12%. An escalation decision is required.
